pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 127.0.0.1.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 9100.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env configure_tcp_output task by confirming that the expected host (127.0.0.1) and port (9100) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic. Discovered a critical defect: both setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable because task_result.json is never generated and the verifier strictly requires reg_changed to pass.
